issues.title: Investigate HanaDB support
issues.body:
We have challenges accessing to the HanaDB and can't verify if the current code is working. 

The Spring AI team is working with @rahulmitt to overcome these challenges. If we can't get it working by RC1, we would need to remove the support unfortunately.

comments.body: Keep the core VectorStore support but had to remove the auto-configuration support as the testing infrastructure for that is not available.
